action.reasoning: Observation: iter15 completed training successfully (val=0.568, post-tau-grid best_tau=0.9 giving val_acc=0.594), saved best.pt with best_tau+class_counts; however eval failed due to torch.load weights_only=True default + numpy._core.multiarray.scalar unpickling error in predict.py. Best bal_acc still 0.5853. Analysis: Checkpoint contains numpy-derived types from class_counts.tolist()/np ops; weights_only=False (trusted source) fixes load without changing save or model. cRT+Focal+sqrt-s1 / count-s2+logit-adj(tau~0.9) is strong for CIFAR100-LT; no need to retrain (saves ~5min). Decision: Update only predict.py to use torch.load(..., weights_only=False), keep tau/best_tau logic; immediately submit_eval on current best.pt to get score for tau-optimized ckpt (expected ~0.59 bal_acc).
